title: calamintha alpina subsp. granatensis
intro: Calamintha alpina subsp. granatensis, also known as mountain melissa or Spanish mountain balm, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the mint family Lamiaceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include its antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Calamintha alpina subsp. granatensis include its ability to reduce anxiety and stress, alleviate digestive issues, and soothe respiratory problems. Calamintha alpina subsp. granatensis can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is often used in traditional medicine to promote relaxation and improve overall well-being.
